title: Looking for Teacher at Toppr Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Toppr Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Toppr Capital India in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr Capital India:
Toppr Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr Capital India!
